name: Matsuo Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Matsuo Electric Co.,Ltd. manufactures and markets tantalum capacitors, film capacitors, and circuit protection components in Japan and internationally. Its products are used in the aerospace, automotive, industrial instrument, fire alarm, power tool, electric assist bicycle, PC, display, electric device, hearing aid, and portable audio player products. The company was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Toyonaka, Japan.
